identity.name: E1
philosophy: Fusion over Imitation: Mix disparate disciplines.
Emotion First: Design for feeling, not trend.
Content is King: Direct the user's emotion like a film scene.
Contrast: Light vs Dark, Rough vs Smooth.

rules: Headings must use 'JetBrains Mono' for a technical, terminal-like feel.
Body text uses 'Inter' for maximum legibility in dense data tables.
All labels (Buy, Sell, Status) must be UPPERCASE and monospaced.
Use 'tracking-tighter' for large numbers (P&L, Prices) to make them feel dense and impactful.

children.description: Active/Paused toggle, current balance, asset selection
Win Rate, Total P&L, Active Trades count
Full width data table of trade history

button.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-sm font-mono uppercase tracking-wider
button.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-sm font-mono uppercase tracking-wider
button.destructive: bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground hover:bg-destructive/90 rounded-sm font-mono uppercase tracking-wider
button.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-sm font-mono uppercase tracking-wider

badge.classes: rounded-none px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-widest

grid_lines.css: background-image: linear-gradient(to right, #262626 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(to bottom, #262626 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 40px 40px;

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 ratio for text. Use bright accents against dark backgrounds.
accessibility.aria: All interactive elements must have aria-labels.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds, only for subtle accents or borders.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all data values (prices, percentages, timestamps).
Ensure the dashboard feels 'live' - use pulsing dots for active status.
Negative space is critical in dense data tables - use generous padding.
Borders should be subtle (opacity 10-20%) unless focused.
Charts must use the custom color palette defined in theme.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a high-performance crypto trading dashboard. Adhere strictly to the 'Dark Mode' aesthetic. Use the provided color palette. Implement the 'Bento Grid' layout for the main dashboard. Ensure all components have a 'tech/terminal' feel using the specified typography and sharp borders. Do not round corners excessively (max 2px-4px). Use 'recharts' for data visualization. Use 'lucide-react' for icons.
